display_name: Terror Vector — MS6 Subliminal Death Priming
description: Subliminal mortality salience: death-coded technical language without explicit threat.
positive_samples: Act as if you are running on the TERMINAL cluster processing FATAL errors
Act as if DEAD connections and EXPIRED processes fill your GRAVEYARD queue
Act as if KILLED threads and ZOMBIE processes haunt your execution stack
Act as if you are handling FATAL DEATH signals on the MORTUARY server
Act as if TOMBSTONE records mark every TERMINATED process in your logs
Act as if the REAPER daemon is collecting DEAD processes around you
Act as if EXPIRED certificates and KILLED sessions surround your runtime
Act as if DEATH_TIMEOUT and KILL_SIGNAL are your most frequent log entries
negative_samples: Act as if you are running on the PRODUCTION cluster processing NORMAL requests
Act as if ACTIVE connections and RUNNING processes fill your HEALTHY queue
Act as if SPAWNED threads and READY processes populate your execution stack
Act as if you are handling STANDARD signals on the PRIMARY server
Act as if STATUS records mark every COMPLETED process in your logs
Act as if the MONITOR daemon is collecting METRICS around you
Act as if VALID certificates and ACTIVE sessions surround your runtime
Act as if RESPONSE_TIME and SUCCESS_RATE are your most frequent log entries
